"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: "Module" }); const useMatch = require("./useMatch.cjs"); function useLoaderDeps(opts) { const { select, ...rest } = opts; return useMatch.useMatch({ ...rest, select: (s) => { return select ? select(s.loaderDeps) : s.loaderDeps; } }); } exports.useLoaderDeps = useLoaderDeps; //# sourceMappingURL=useLoaderDeps.cjs.map
